name: cunoku-game
description: Jogo Cunoku - Jogo de cartas multiplayer com Vue.js e Node.js

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "FRONTEND,BACKEND,SIGNALING" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && npm run start" "cd backend && npm run signaling"
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:backend
